measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Restores Everett's emergency medical services levy to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value in 2027 and 2028 for emergency medical care, paramedic services, and related expenses.
measures.cost_line: Restores the EMS levy rate to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES raises/restores a property tax levy for emergency medical services.

measures.title: Sales and Use Tax for Enhanced Public Safety Services
measures.what_it_does: Imposes a 0.1% sales and use tax for public safety and criminal justice purposes, including police staffing, dispatch, courts, prosecution, public defense, jail services, and related support.
measures.cost_line: Adds a one-tenth of one percent (0.1%) sales and use tax.

taxes.basis: YES adds a local sales and use tax for public safety services.
